name: Functional Infusion Website
description: Full B2B website build for Functional Infusion co-packing facility in Waupaca, WI. Sage green design system, DM Serif Display + DM Sans fonts, Lucide icons, full pricing data, policy pages, and security/SEO throughout.
todoBeforeLaunch: Replace photo-placeholder divs with real facility/product photography
Add real favicon and apple-touch-icon assets
Set actual company phone number in nav/footer
Wire contact form to backend /api/quote endpoint with server-side validation
Submit sitemap.xml to Google Search Console
Set up canonical domain redirect (www → non-www or vice versa)
Enable mod_evasive rate limiting on Apache server
Replace Lucide CDN with self-hosted build for maximum CSP control
Replace Google Fonts with self-hosted WOFF2 files for maximum CSP control
Run Lighthouse audit (target 95+ across all categories)
Test across Chrome, Safari, Firefox, iOS Safari, Android Chrome
Verify all anchor links (#canning, #shots, #gummies) scroll correctly
